features.name: parametric interface with flatten pass
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog interface with a parameter that is processed through hierarchy -check -top and then flatten operations

features.name: wire with backslash in name
features.description: Code should include a wire with a backslash character in its name, which is legal SystemVerilog but causes internal errors during flatten

features.name: keep attribute on internal wire
features.description: Code should include a wire with a keep attribute and a dot or backslash in the name to trigger the assertion failure
